title: Drop Linux Capabilities
description:
## Drop Linux Capabilities

By default, containers are granted a set of Linux capabilities. Dropping ALL capabilities and adding back only what is explicitly needed follows the principle of least privilege and is a CKS exam requirement.

**Your task:**

Create a Pod named `nocaps-pod` using `nginx:alpine` with the following capability configuration in the container `securityContext`:
- Drop **ALL** capabilities
- Add back only **`NET_BIND_SERVICE`** (required by nginx to bind to port 80)

```bash
# Verify:
kubectl get pod nocaps-pod -o jsonpath='{.spec.containers[0].securityContext.capabilities}'
```

hints.title: capabilities drop and add
hints.command:
cat <<EOF | kubectl apply -f -
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: nocaps-pod
spec:
  containers:
  - name: app
    image: nginx:alpine
    securityContext:
      capabilities:
        drop:
        - ALL
        add:
        - NET_BIND_SERVICE
EOF
